records.m_Talk_ENG: Phew... I think that should do it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Phew... I think that should do it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Phew... I think that should do it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you hurt anywhere?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you hurt anywhere?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you hurt anywhere?

records.m_Talk_ENG: My Eternium shield is running low...
records.m_Talk_DEU: My Eternium shield is running low...
records.m_Talk_FRA: My Eternium shield is running low...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I charged it with things I extracted from the C.O.s, but... I'm not sure how long it will last.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I charged it with things I extracted from the C.O.s, but... I'm not sure how long it will last.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I charged it with things I extracted from the C.O.s, but... I'm not sure how long it will last.

records.m_Talk_ENG: By the way, you're strong. One of the strongest Counters I've met.
records.m_Talk_DEU: By the way, you're strong. One of the strongest Counters I've met.
records.m_Talk_FRA: By the way, you're strong. One of the strongest Counters I've met.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah. Thank you for the compliment.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah. Thank you for the compliment.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah. Thank you for the compliment.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I still have a long way to go, but I'm hanging in there.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I still have a long way to go, but I'm hanging in there.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I still have a long way to go, but I'm hanging in there.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The memories still play even after defeating the C.O.s.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The memories still play even after defeating the C.O.s.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The memories still play even after defeating the C.O.s.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's just how this place works.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's just how this place works.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's just how this place works.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Resistance from the Society is stronger than we expected! They are injecting Fragments into their bodies to stop us!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Resistance from the Society is stronger than we expected! They are injecting Fragments into their bodies to stop us!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Resistance from the Society is stronger than we expected! They are injecting Fragments into their bodies to stop us!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What is this ritual even for...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What is this ritual even for...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What is this ritual even for...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Corruption ray density is rapidly increasing! We will be wiped out at this rate!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Corruption ray density is rapidly increasing! We will be wiped out at this rate!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Corruption ray density is rapidly increasing! We will be wiped out at this rate!

records.m_Talk_ENG: After we're done evacuating everyone in this area, you all should meet back with the retreat team.
records.m_Talk_DEU: After we're done evacuating everyone in this area, you all should meet back with the retreat team.
records.m_Talk_FRA: After we're done evacuating everyone in this area, you all should meet back with the retreat team.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll follow as soon as I've evacuated the remaining civilians.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll follow as soon as I've evacuated the remaining civilians.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll follow as soon as I've evacuated the remaining civilians.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Retreat team! Report!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Retreat team! Report!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Retreat team! Report!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Retreat team. Report your status. Have you requested for backup yet?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Retreat team. Report your status. Have you requested for backup yet?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Retreat team. Report your status. Have you requested for backup yet?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Retreat team?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Retreat team?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Retreat team?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Qlipha Imaginary Energy is rising too quickly! I-if this continues...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Qlipha Imaginary Energy is rising too quickly! I-if this continues...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Qlipha Imaginary Energy is rising too quickly! I-if this continues...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aaargh!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aaargh!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aaargh!

records.m_Talk_ENG: T-tentacles on my body...! S-someone cut these off from me!
records.m_Talk_DEU: T-tentacles on my body...! S-someone cut these off from me!
records.m_Talk_FRA: T-tentacles on my body...! S-someone cut these off from me!

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Who, who am I, who am I, who am I, who am I, who am I, who am I, who am I, who am I, who am I, who am I, who am I, who am I, who am I, who am I, who am I?</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Who, who am I, who am I, who am I, who am I, who am I, who am I, who am I, who am I, who am I, who am I, who am I, who am I, who am I, who am I, who am I?</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Who, who am I, who am I, who am I, who am I, who am I, who am I, who am I, who am I, who am I, who am I, who am I, who am I, who am I, who am I, who am I?</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shoot them all! It's too late for the ones that have started to mutate!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shoot them all! It's too late for the ones that have started to mutate!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shoot them all! It's too late for the ones that have started to mutate!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The feast of knowledge has been prepared. The banquet has started.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The feast of knowledge has been prepared. The banquet has started.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The feast of knowledge has been prepared. The banquet has started.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Grrr kggggh. H-h-h-help me. Has started.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Grrr kggggh. H-h-h-help me. Has started.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Grrr kggggh. H-h-h-help me. Has started.
